ex.jp: この本は定価の半額で売られていた。
ex.en: This book was sold at half the list price.

qs.s: セール品ではないので、＿＿＿＿どおりの値段で買った。
qs.en: It wasn't a sale item, so I bought it at the list price.
qs.e: 定価 = the set list/retail price. 割引 = a discount. 原価(げんか) = the cost price (to produce/buy in). 時価(じか) = the current market price (fluctuating).

qs.s: 「定価」の意味は？
qs.e: 定価 is the official set price of a product (定価販売 = selling at list price). Note the homophones 低下 (decline) and 定価 are different words.

ex.jp: 叔父は父の弟だ。
ex.en: My uncle is my father's younger brother.

qs.s: 夏休みに、田舎の＿＿＿＿の家に泊まりに行った。
qs.en: During summer break, I went to stay at my uncle's house in the countryside.
qs.e: 叔父(おじ) = uncle (younger than one's parent). 叔母(おば) = aunt. 祖父(そふ) = grandfather. 甥(おい) = nephew. (Note: 伯父 is an uncle older than one's parent.)

qs.s: 「叔父」の意味は？
qs.e: 叔父 is an uncle; 叔母 is an aunt (both おじ/おば). 伯父/伯母 are used for those older than your parent.

ex.jp: 子どもは昆虫図鑑が大好きだ。
ex.en: The child loves the insect picture book.

qs.s: 見たことのない花を、植物＿＿＿＿で調べた。
qs.en: I looked up a flower I'd never seen in a plant reference book.
qs.e: 図鑑 = an illustrated reference book (with pictures, organized by type). 辞典(じてん) = a dictionary (of words/terms). 地図 = a map. 写真集 = a photo collection/photobook.

qs.s: 「図鑑」の意味は？
qs.e: 図鑑 organizes pictures with descriptions for identification (動物図鑑 = animal encyclopedia, 図鑑で調べる = look it up in a reference book).

m: tip; pointed end; (figurative) cutting edge; forefront

ex.jp: 鉛筆の先端が折れた。
ex.en: The tip of the pencil broke.

qs.s: その研究所は、最＿＿＿＿の技術を開発している。
qs.en: That institute develops cutting-edge technology.
qs.e: 先端 = the tip/pointed end; figuratively the cutting edge/forefront. 末端(まったん) = the extremity/far end; the lowest level (rank-and-file). 頂点 = the peak/apex. 中心 = the center.

qs.s: 「先端」の意味は？
o: tip; pointed end; cutting edge; forefront
the extremity; far end; lowest level
qs.e: 先端 is a pointed tip (針の先端 = the point of a needle) and figuratively the leading edge (最先端 = state of the art, 先端技術 = advanced technology).

ex.jp: 祭りで太鼓の音が響いた。
ex.en: The sound of taiko drums rang out at the festival.

qs.s: 子どもたちが力いっぱい＿＿＿＿を叩いた。
qs.en: The children beat the drums with all their might.
qs.e: 太鼓(たいこ) = a (Japanese) drum. 笛(ふえ) = a flute/whistle. 鐘(かね) = a bell (large, struck). 琴(こと) = a koto (Japanese zither).

qs.s: 「太鼓」の意味は？
qs.e: 太鼓 is a drum (太鼓を叩く = beat a drum, 和太鼓 = Japanese taiko). The idiom 太鼓判を押す = to vouch for/guarantee.

ex.jp: この円の直径は十センチだ。
ex.en: The diameter of this circle is ten centimeters.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿五メートルもある巨大なピザが話題になった。
qs.en: A giant pizza with a diameter of five meters became a hot topic.
qs.e: 直径 = diameter (across the full width through the center). 半径(はんけい) = radius (center to edge, half the diameter). 面積 = area. 周囲(しゅうい) = the circumference/surroundings.

qs.s: 「直径」の意味は？
qs.e: 直径 is the diameter of a circle (直径を測る = measure the diameter). 半径 (radius) is half of it.

ex.jp: 台風の影響で停電が起きた。
ex.en: A power outage occurred due to the typhoon.

qs.s: 落雷で＿＿＿＿になり、町中が真っ暗になった。
qs.en: A lightning strike caused a blackout, and the whole town went dark.
qs.e: 停電 = a power outage/blackout. 断水(だんすい) = a water supply cutoff. 節電(せつでん) = conserving electricity. 発電 = generating electricity.

qs.s: 「停電」の意味は？
qs.e: 停電 means the electricity going out (停電する = lose power, 停電に備える = prepare for a blackout).

ex.jp: 彼は東洋の文化に興味がある。
ex.en: He is interested in Eastern culture.

qs.s: 漢方は＿＿＿＿医学の代表的な例だ。
qs.en: Kampo is a representative example of Eastern medicine.
qs.e: 東洋 = the East/Orient (Asia). 西洋(せいよう) = the West/Occident (Europe & the Americas). 南極(なんきょく) = the South Pole/Antarctic. 北極(ほっきょく) = the North Pole/Arctic.

qs.s: 「東洋」の意味は？
qs.e: 東洋 refers to Eastern/Asian civilization (東洋人 = an Asian person, 東洋医学 = Eastern medicine). Opposite of 西洋 (the West).

m: long ago; already; a long time ago

ex.jp: 彼ならとっくに帰ったよ。
ex.en: He went home a long time ago.

qs.s: 急いで来たのに、電車は＿＿＿＿出てしまっていた。
qs.en: I rushed here, but the train had already left long ago.
qs.e: とっくに = long ago/already (well before now). 間もなく = soon/before long. そろそろ = soon/it's about time. ようやく = finally/at last.

qs.s: 「とっくに」の意味は？
o: long ago; already; well before now
qs.e: とっくに stresses that something happened much earlier than expected (とっくに終わった = finished ages ago). ≒ とうに.

m: completely; all of it; without exception; every last one

ex.jp: 皿の料理を残らず食べた。
ex.en: I ate everything on the plate, leaving nothing.

qs.s: 集めた資料に、＿＿＿＿目を通しておいた。
qs.en: I looked through every last one of the materials I had gathered.
qs.e: 残らず = completely/every last one (leaving nothing behind). 少しずつ = little by little. せっかく = with effort/(a shame to waste). めったに = (with neg.) rarely.

qs.s: 「残らず」の意味は？
o: completely; all of it; every last one
qs.e: 残らず means leaving nothing behind — all without exception (一人残らず = every single person, 残らず平らげる = polish it all off).

ex.jp: 彼に恨みを抱いている人は多い。
ex.en: Many people harbor a grudge against him.

qs.s: 過去のいさかいから、彼女に＿＿＿＿を持っていたらしい。
qs.en: He apparently held a grudge against her from a past quarrel.
qs.e: 恨み = resentment/a grudge (lingering ill will). 感謝 = gratitude. 憧れ(あこがれ) = longing/admiration. 親しみ = a sense of closeness/affinity.

qs.s: 「恨み」の意味は？
qs.e: 恨み is a held grudge (恨みを買う = incur someone's resentment, 恨みを晴らす = take one's revenge). The verb is 恨む (to resent).

m: interval; spacing; gap (between things in time or space)

ex.jp: 電車は十分間隔で運行している。
ex.en: The trains run at ten-minute intervals.

qs.s: 木を植えるときは、十分な＿＿＿＿をあけたほうがいい。
qs.en: When planting trees, it's best to leave sufficient spacing.
qs.e: 間隔 = the interval/spacing between repeated things (regular gaps in time or space). 距離 = distance (length between two points). 面積 = area. 隙間 = a narrow gap/crack.

qs.s: 「間隔」の意味は？
o: interval; spacing; gap between repeated things
qs.e: 間隔 is the regular spacing between things (間隔をあける = leave a gap, 等間隔 = at equal intervals). 距離 is point-to-point distance.

ex.jp: 幅広い読書は教養を深める。
ex.en: Wide reading deepens one's cultivation.

qs.s: 彼は専門知識だけでなく、豊かな＿＿＿＿の持ち主だ。
qs.en: He possesses not only expertise but also rich general culture.
qs.e: 教養 = cultivation/refinement gained through broad learning. 学歴 = one's formal educational background. 知能 = intelligence (mental capacity). 常識 = common sense/general knowledge.

qs.s: 「教養」の意味は？
qs.e: 教養 is the breadth of knowledge and refinement a person has cultivated (教養がある = cultured, 一般教養 = general/liberal-arts education).

m: worthless; trivial; silly; not worth bothering with

ex.jp: くだらない冗談で笑ってしまった。
ex.en: I laughed at a silly joke.

qs.s: そんな＿＿＿＿ことで、いちいち腹を立てるな。
qs.en: Don't get angry over every such trivial thing.
qs.e: くだらない = worthless/trivial/silly (not worth taking seriously). 素晴らしい = wonderful/splendid. 重大な = grave/serious/momentous. 真剣な = serious/earnest.

qs.s: 「くだらない」の意味は？
qs.e: くだらない dismisses something as worthless or pointless (くだらない話 = a stupid/pointless story, くだらないことを気にするな = don't sweat the trivial stuff).

m: affirmation; answering in the affirmative; acknowledging as so

ex.jp: 彼は質問に肯定も否定もしなかった。
ex.en: He neither affirmed nor denied the question.

qs.s: 上司は私の提案を＿＿＿＿的に受け止めてくれた。
qs.en: My boss received my proposal affirmatively (favorably).
qs.e: 肯定 = affirming/acknowledging as true or acceptable. 否定(ひてい) = denial/negation (the opposite). 疑問 = a doubt/question. 拒否(きょひ) = refusal/rejection.

qs.s: 「肯定」の意味は？
qs.e: 肯定 means affirming or accepting something as valid (肯定的 = positive/affirmative, 自己肯定感 = self-affirmation/self-esteem). Opposite of 否定.

m: focus; focal point; the central issue

ex.jp: カメラの焦点を合わせる。
ex.en: To bring the camera into focus.

qs.s: 議論の＿＿＿＿は、費用を誰が負担するかにある。
qs.en: The focus of the debate lies in who bears the cost.
qs.e: 焦点 = the focus/focal point; the central issue. 頂点 = the peak/apex. 起点(きてん) = the starting point. 中継(ちゅうけい) = relay/live broadcast.

qs.s: 「焦点」の意味は？
o: focus; focal point; the central issue
qs.e: 焦点 is the focal point (焦点が合う = come into focus) and figuratively the crux (焦点を絞る = narrow the focus, 議論の焦点 = the main point at issue).

ex.jp: 初対面では名刺を交換する。
ex.en: At a first meeting, we exchange business cards.

qs.s: 打ち合わせの前に、お互いの＿＿＿＿を渡し合った。
qs.en: Before the meeting, we exchanged business cards with each other.
qs.e: 名刺 = a business card (with one's name, title, contact). 名簿(めいぼ) = a name list/roster. 名札(なふだ) = a name tag/badge. 署名(しょめい) = a signature.

qs.s: 「名刺」の意味は？
qs.e: 名刺 is a business card (名刺交換 = exchanging cards, 名刺入れ = a card holder).

m: to go around; to tour; to revolve around (a topic)

ex.jp: 休みに各地の温泉を巡った。
ex.en: On my break, I toured hot springs in various places.

qs.s: 遺産の相続を＿＿＿＿、兄弟が争っている。
qs.en: The siblings are fighting over the inheritance.
qs.e: 巡る = to go around/tour; (〜を巡って) to revolve around/concern an issue. 隔てる(へだてる) = to separate/divide. 越える = to cross over/exceed. 兼ねる(かねる) = to combine roles/serve as both.

qs.s: 「巡る」の意味は？
o: to go around; to tour; to revolve around (a topic)
to combine roles; to serve as both
qs.e: 巡る means to go around (名所を巡る = tour the sights, 季節が巡る = the seasons come around) or, as 〜を巡って, to center on an issue (〜を巡る議論 = a debate over ~).

ex.jp: 気圧が下がると頭痛がする人もいる。
ex.en: Some people get headaches when the air pressure drops.

qs.s: 低＿＿＿＿が近づいており、明日は天気が崩れるだろう。
qs.en: A low-pressure system is approaching, so the weather will likely turn bad tomorrow.
qs.e: 気圧 = atmospheric/air pressure. 気温 = air temperature. 湿度 = humidity. 気候 = climate (long-term pattern).

qs.s: 「気圧」の意味は？
qs.e: 気圧 is air pressure (低気圧 = low-pressure system, 高気圧 = high-pressure system, 気圧が下がる = pressure drops).

ex.jp: 鳥が空中を自由に飛び回る。
ex.en: Birds fly freely about in the air.

qs.s: 曲芸師が＿＿＿＿で見事に三回転した。
qs.en: The acrobat splendidly did three rotations in midair.
qs.e: 空中 = midair/in the air. 地中(ちちゅう) = underground/in the soil. 水中(すいちゅう) = underwater. 海底(かいてい) = the seabed/ocean floor.

qs.s: 「空中」の意味は？
qs.e: 空中 means up in the air (空中分解 = breaking apart in midair, 空中ブランコ = trapeze).

ex.jp: 紙の原料は木材だ。
ex.en: The raw material for paper is wood.

qs.s: ワインは、ぶどうを＿＿＿＿として造られる。
qs.en: Wine is made using grapes as its raw material.
qs.e: 原料 = raw material (the substance processed into a product, often unrecognizable in the result). 材料 = materials/ingredients (used in making; often still recognizable). 製品 = a finished product. 燃料 = fuel.

qs.s: 「原料」の意味は？
o: raw material; base ingredient (processed into a product)
qs.e: 原料 is the raw substance transformed in production (原料費 = cost of raw materials). 材料 tends to stay recognizable in the result; 原料 is processed beyond recognition (e.g. crude oil → plastic).

ex.jp: お盆には先祖の墓参りをする。
ex.en: During Obon we visit our ancestors' graves.

qs.s: 我が家の＿＿＿＿は、代々この土地で農業を営んできた。
qs.en: My family's ancestors have farmed this land for generations.
qs.e: 先祖(せんぞ) = ancestors/forebears. 子孫 = descendants/offspring (the opposite). 親戚 = relatives. 他人 = a stranger/unrelated person.

qs.s: 「先祖」の意味は？
qs.e: 先祖 are one's ancestors (先祖代々 = for generations, ご先祖様 = one's honored ancestors). ≒ 祖先. Opposite of 子孫.

ex.jp: 会議では通訳を通して話した。
ex.en: At the meeting, we spoke through an interpreter.

qs.s: 外国人の患者のために、医療＿＿＿＿が同席した。
qs.en: A medical interpreter sat in for the foreign patient.
qs.e: 通訳 = interpreting speech orally / an interpreter (real-time, spoken). 翻訳(ほんやく) = translation of written text. 会話 = conversation. 通信 = communication/correspondence (telecom).

qs.s: 「通訳」の意味は？
qs.e: 通訳 is oral interpreting between languages (同時通訳 = simultaneous interpreting, 通訳者 = an interpreter). 翻訳 is for written translation.

ex.jp: 予定を手帳に書き込んだ。
ex.en: I wrote my schedule in my planner.

qs.s: 忘れないように、約束を＿＿＿＿にメモしておく。
qs.en: So as not to forget, I jot down appointments in my planner.
qs.e: 手帳 = a pocket notebook/planner (for schedules, notes). 名簿 = a name list/roster. 書類 = documents/paperwork. 封筒(ふうとう) = an envelope.

qs.s: 「手帳」の意味は？
qs.e: 手帳 is a small notebook for personal scheduling and notes (手帳に書く = write in one's planner, システム手帳 = a ring-binder organizer).

m: the city center; downtown (esp. central Tokyo)

ex.jp: 都心は家賃が高い。
ex.en: Rent is high in the city center.

qs.s: 通勤に便利なので、＿＿＿＿に近い場所に住みたい。
qs.en: Since it's convenient for commuting, I want to live near the city center.
qs.e: 都心 = the central area of a big city (downtown). 郊外(こうがい) = the suburbs/outskirts. 田舎(いなか) = the countryside/rural area. 地方 = the provinces/regions (outside the capital).

qs.s: 「都心」の意味は？
o: the provinces; regions outside the capital
qs.e: 都心 is the heart of a metropolis (都心部 = the downtown area, 都心へ出る = go into the city center). Opposite leaning: 郊外 (suburbs).

ex.jp: 日曜の午後は昼寝をするのが好きだ。
ex.en: I like taking a nap on Sunday afternoons.

qs.s: 赤ちゃんが＿＿＿＿している間に、家事を済ませた。
qs.en: While the baby was napping, I finished the housework.
qs.e: 昼寝 = a (daytime/afternoon) nap. 夜更かし(よふかし) = staying up late. 寝坊(ねぼう) = oversleeping. 居眠り(いねむり) = dozing off (unintentionally, e.g. at a desk).

qs.s: 「昼寝」の意味は？
qs.e: 昼寝 is a deliberate daytime nap (昼寝をする = take a nap). 居眠り is nodding off when you shouldn't.

m: role; duty; one's part to play; function

ex.jp: 親の役目は子どもを守ることだ。
ex.en: A parent's role is to protect their children.

qs.s: 会議の記録を取るのが、新人の私の＿＿＿＿だ。
qs.en: Taking minutes of the meeting is my duty as the new hire.
qs.e: 役目 = a role/duty one is responsible for. 名目(めいもく) = a nominal reason/pretext (in name). 項目 = an item/category in a list. 題目(だいもく) = a title/topic/subject heading.

qs.s: 「役目」の意味は？
o: role; duty; one's part to play; function
an item; category in a list
qs.e: 役目 is the role or duty assigned to someone or something (役目を果たす = fulfill one's duty, 役目を終える = finish one's role). ≒ 役割.

m: with all one's might; to one's heart's content; as hard as one can

ex.jp: 休日は思いっきり遊んだ。
ex.en: On my day off, I played to my heart's content.

qs.s: ストレス発散に、カラオケで＿＿＿＿歌った。
qs.en: To blow off stress, I sang my heart out at karaoke.
qs.e: 思いっきり = with all one's might/to the fullest (without holding back). こっそり = secretly/stealthily. しぶしぶ = reluctantly. それとなく = indirectly/casually (hinting).

qs.s: 「思いっきり」の意味は？
o: with all one's might; to one's heart's content
qs.e: 思いっきり means doing something fully without restraint (思いっきり泣く = cry one's eyes out, 思いっきり楽しむ = enjoy to the max). ≒ 思い切り.

m: practice; training; lessons (esp. arts, sumo, traditional skills)

ex.jp: 毎日、剣道の稽古に励んでいる。
ex.en: I devote myself to kendo practice every day.

qs.s: 力士は朝早くから厳しい＿＿＿＿に明け暮れる。
qs.en: Sumo wrestlers spend their days in hard training from early morning.
qs.e: 稽古 = practice/training in an art or traditional discipline (martial arts, dance, sumo). 試合 = a match/bout. 休憩 = a break/rest. 観戦(かんせん) = watching a game/match (as a spectator).

qs.s: 「稽古」の意味は？
o: watching a game as a spectator
qs.e: 稽古 is practice in traditional arts and disciplines (お稽古 = (taking) lessons, 稽古をつける = to train/coach someone). ≒ 練習, but with a traditional/disciplinary flavor.

ex.jp: おにぎりを三角の形に握る。
ex.en: You shape the rice ball into a triangle.

qs.s: 折り紙を半分に折ると、＿＿＿＿の形になる。
qs.en: When you fold the origami in half, it becomes a triangle.
qs.e: 三角(さんかく) = a triangle. 四角(しかく) = a square/quadrilateral. 丸(まる) = a circle/round shape. 楕円(だえん) = an oval/ellipse.

qs.s: 「三角」の意味は？
qs.e: 三角 is a triangle (三角形 = a triangle figure, 三角関係 = a love triangle). Contrast 四角 (square).

ex.jp: 棚を水平に取り付ける。
ex.en: To install the shelf level (horizontally).

qs.s: カメラを＿＿＿＿に構えないと、写真が傾いてしまう。
qs.en: If you don't hold the camera level, the photo comes out tilted.
qs.e: 水平 = horizontal/level (parallel to the ground). 垂直(すいちょく) = vertical/perpendicular. 斜め = diagonal/slanted. 平行(へいこう) = parallel.

qs.s: 「水平」の意味は？
qs.e: 水平 means level/horizontal (水平線 = the horizon, 水平に保つ = keep level). Opposite of 垂直 (vertical).

m: refreshed; clear; neat and tidy; uncluttered

ex.jp: 部屋を片付けたら、気分がすっきりした。
ex.en: After tidying the room, I felt refreshed.

qs.s: 余計な装飾を取り除き、＿＿＿＿としたデザインに変えた。
qs.en: We removed the excess ornamentation and changed it to a clean, uncluttered design.
qs.e: すっきり = refreshed/clear/neat (free of clutter or discomfort). ぐったり = limp/worn out (exhausted). うっかり = carelessly/absent-mindedly. がっかり = disappointed.

qs.s: 「すっきり」の意味は？
qs.e: すっきり conveys a clean, refreshed, unburdened feeling (頭がすっきりする = feel clear-headed, すっきりした部屋 = a tidy room).

m: increase; growth; enlargement (in amount or degree)

ex.jp: 利用者の増大に対応する。
ex.en: To cope with the increase in users.

qs.s: 高齢化に伴い、医療費の＿＿＿＿が続いている。
qs.en: With the aging population, the increase in medical costs continues.
qs.e: 増大 = increase/growth (in scale, amount, or degree). 減少 = decrease/decline (the opposite). 縮小 = reduction/scaling down. 維持(いじ) = maintenance/keeping as is.

qs.s: 「増大」の意味は？
qs.e: 増大 means growing larger in amount or degree (リスクの増大 = increased risk, 負担が増大する = the burden grows). Opposite of 減少/縮小.

m: to crush; to squash; to kill (time); to ruin; to waste

ex.jp: 空き缶を踏んで潰した。
ex.en: I stepped on the empty can and crushed it.

qs.s: 電車の待ち時間を、本を読んで＿＿＿＿。
qs.en: I killed the time waiting for the train by reading a book.
qs.e: 潰す = to crush/squash; figuratively to kill (time), ruin (a plan), or waste. 隠す = to hide. 断る(ことわる) = to refuse/decline. 逃す(のがす) = to miss/let slip.

qs.s: 「潰す」の意味は？
o: to crush; to squash; to kill (time); to ruin; to waste
qs.e: 潰す literally means to crush (潰れる is the intransitive pair) and figuratively to kill time (時間を潰す), ruin (計画を潰す = wreck a plan), or waste (顔を潰す = make someone lose face).

m: coming and going; going in and out; frequenting

ex.jp: このビルは人の出入りが激しい。
ex.en: There's heavy coming and going of people in this building.

qs.s: 工事関係者以外の＿＿＿＿は禁止されている。
qs.en: Entry and exit by anyone other than construction personnel is prohibited.
qs.e: 出入り = going in and out/coming and going (also frequenting a place). 出席 = attendance (being present). 出発 = departure/setting off. 出張 = a business trip.

qs.s: 「出入り」の意味は？
o: coming and going; going in and out; frequenting
qs.e: 出入り means entering and leaving (出入り口 = an entrance/exit, 出入りが激しい = a lot of traffic in and out, 出入りの業者 = a regular vendor).

ex.jp: 彼は映画評論を書いている。
ex.en: He writes film criticism.

qs.s: その＿＿＿＿家は、社会問題について鋭い意見を述べる。
qs.en: That critic offers sharp opinions on social issues.
qs.e: 評論 = critical commentary/critique (analyzing and discussing a work or issue). 評判(ひょうばん) = reputation/public talk. 評価 = evaluation/appraisal (judging worth). 批判 = criticism (pointing out faults, often negative).

qs.s: 「評論」の意味は？
qs.e: 評論 is reasoned critique/commentary (評論家 = a critic/commentator, 文芸評論 = literary criticism). 批判 leans negative (faultfinding); 評論 is balanced analysis.

m: a famous local product; specialty; (also) a well-known character

ex.jp: この町の名物はうなぎだ。
ex.en: This town's specialty is eel.

qs.s: 旅行先では、その土地の＿＿＿＿料理を必ず味わう。
qs.en: When traveling, I always sample the local specialty cuisine.
qs.e: 名物 = a famous local product/specialty (often food). 名作 = a masterpiece (a celebrated work). 名所(めいしょ) = a famous place/scenic spot. 名人(めいじん) = a master/expert.

qs.s: 「名物」の意味は？
qs.e: 名物 is something a place is famous for (名物料理 = a signature local dish); can also mean a well-known local figure (名物社長 = a famous/colorful boss).

ex.jp: 忘年会の宴会で盛り上がった。
ex.en: The year-end banquet was lively.

qs.s: 取引先を招いて、ホテルで盛大な＿＿＿＿を開いた。
qs.en: We invited our business partners and held a grand banquet at the hotel.
qs.e: 宴会 = a banquet/drinking party (social feast). 会議 = a (business) meeting. 面会 = visiting/meeting someone (e.g. a patient). 集会 = an organized assembly/rally.

qs.s: 「宴会」の意味は？
qs.e: 宴会 is a celebratory party with food and drink (宴会場 = a banquet hall, 宴会芸 = party entertainment/tricks).

ex.jp: 彼女はいい香りの香水をつけている。
ex.en: She is wearing a nice-smelling perfume.

qs.s: つけすぎた＿＿＿＿の匂いが、部屋中に充満していた。
qs.en: The smell of too much perfume filled the whole room.
qs.e: 香水(こうすい) = perfume/fragrance. 化粧(けしょう) = makeup/cosmetics. 石鹸(せっけん) = soap. 洗剤(せんざい) = detergent.

qs.s: 「香水」の意味は？
qs.e: 香水 is perfume (香水をつける = put on perfume, 香水の香り = the scent of perfume).

ex.jp: 二つの薬品を混合する。
ex.en: To mix the two chemicals.

qs.s: この競技は、男女＿＿＿＿のチームで行われる。
qs.en: This event is played with mixed men's and women's teams.
qs.e: 混合 = mixing/blending different things together. 分離(ぶんり) = separation (pulling apart). 単独(たんどく) = single/solo/alone. 純粋 = pure/unmixed.

qs.s: 「混合」の意味は？
qs.e: 混合 means combining different elements into a mixture (混合物 = a mixture, 男女混合 = mixed-gender). Opposite of 分離.

ex.jp: その判断は妥当だと思う。
ex.en: I think that judgment is reasonable.

qs.s: 提示された価格は、市場相場から見て＿＿＿＿だ。
qs.en: The price offered is reasonable in light of the market rate.
qs.e: 妥当 = valid/appropriate/reasonable (fitting and justified). 不当(ふとう) = unjust/unreasonable (the opposite). 過剰 = excessive. 異常 = abnormal/unusual.

qs.s: 「妥当」の意味は？
qs.e: 妥当 means fitting and justified (妥当な judgment/price = a reasonable one, 妥当性 = validity/appropriateness). Opposite of 不当. Don't confuse with 妥協 (compromise).

ex.jp: 二点を直線で結ぶ。
ex.en: To connect two points with a straight line.

qs.s: 定規を使って、ノートに＿＿＿＿を引いた。
qs.en: Using a ruler, I drew a straight line in my notebook.
qs.e: 直線 = a straight line. 曲線(きょくせん) = a curve/curved line. 点線(てんせん) = a dotted line. 対角線(たいかくせん) = a diagonal line.

qs.s: 「直線」の意味は？
qs.e: 直線 is a straight line (直線距離 = straight-line distance, 直線的 = straightforward/linear). Opposite of 曲線 (curve).

ex.jp: 祖母は強い方言で話す。
ex.en: My grandmother speaks with a strong dialect.

qs.s: 同じ日本語でも、地域によって＿＿＿＿が大きく異なる。
qs.en: Even in the same Japanese, the dialect differs greatly by region.
qs.e: 方言 = a regional dialect. 標準語(ひょうじゅんご) = the standard language. 外来語(がいらいご) = loanwords (from foreign languages). 流行語(りゅうこうご) = a buzzword/trendy expression.

qs.s: 「方言」の意味は？
qs.e: 方言 is regional speech that differs from the standard (関西方言 = the Kansai dialect, お国言葉 = local dialect). Opposite of 標準語.

ex.jp: この調査には膨大な時間がかかった。
ex.en: This survey took an enormous amount of time.

qs.s: インターネット上には、＿＿＿＿な量の情報があふれている。
qs.en: A vast amount of information overflows on the internet.
qs.e: 膨大 = enormous/vast in quantity or scale. 僅か(わずか) = a mere/slight amount. 微量(びりょう) = a trace/tiny amount. 小規模(しょうきぼ) = small-scale.

qs.s: 「膨大」の意味は？
qs.e: 膨大 describes an overwhelming amount or scale (膨大なデータ = vast data, 膨大な費用 = enormous costs). Don't confuse with 莫大 (huge, esp. of money/figures).

m: a flock; herd; crowd; swarm (a group of creatures)

ex.jp: 羊の群れが草原を移動している。
ex.en: A flock of sheep is moving across the grassland.

qs.s: 渡り鳥が大きな＿＿＿＿をなして、南へ飛んでいった。
qs.en: The migratory birds formed a large flock and flew south.
qs.e: 群れ = a flock/herd/swarm (a mass of animals or people moving together). 列(れつ) = a line/row/queue. 束(たば) = a bundle/bunch (tied together). 粒(つぶ) = a grain/small bit.

qs.s: 「群れ」の意味は？
qs.e: 群れ is a group of creatures gathered or moving together (魚の群れ = a school of fish, 群れをなす = form a flock). The verb is 群れる.

ex.jp: 物語の王女は美しく賢かった。
ex.en: The princess in the story was beautiful and wise.

qs.s: その国の＿＿＿＿は、外国の王子と結婚した。
qs.en: The princess of that country married a foreign prince.
qs.e: 王女(おうじょ) = a princess (a king's daughter). 王子(おうじ) = a prince (a king's son). 女王(じょおう) = a queen (a reigning female monarch). 王様(おうさま) = the king.

qs.s: 「王女」の意味は？
qs.e: 王女 is a princess by birth. Distinct from 女王 (a queen who reigns) and 王子 (prince).

m: the last third of a month (roughly the 21st–end)

ex.jp: 発売は来月の下旬の予定だ。
ex.en: The release is scheduled for late next month.

qs.s: 梅雨は六月＿＿＿＿から七月にかけて続く。
qs.en: The rainy season continues from late June into July.
qs.e: 下旬(げじゅん) = the last third of a month (~21st onward). 上旬(じょうじゅん) = the first third (1st–10th). 中旬(ちゅうじゅん) = the middle third (11th–20th). 月末 = the very end of the month.

qs.s: 「下旬」の意味は？
o: the last third of a month (~21st–end)
the very end of the month
qs.e: 下旬 covers roughly the 21st to month's end. The trio: 上旬 (early), 中旬 (mid), 下旬 (late).

m: an idea/clue (of what's behind something); recollection

ex.jp: 犯人について心当たりはありますか。
ex.en: Do you have any idea who the culprit might be?

qs.s: 財布をどこで失くしたか、全く＿＿＿＿がない。
qs.en: I have no idea at all where I lost my wallet.
qs.e: 心当たり = a clue/idea/recollection of what might be behind something. 思いやり = consideration/empathy. 心構え(こころがまえ) = mental preparedness/readiness. 気がかり = a worry/concern.

qs.s: 「心当たり」の意味は？
o: an idea/clue of what's behind something; recollection
qs.e: 心当たり is having some notion of the cause or whereabouts of something (心当たりがある = to have an idea, 心当たりを探す = search where you think it might be).

ex.jp: 子どもに毎月小遣いをあげている。
ex.en: I give my child an allowance every month.

qs.s: お＿＿＿＿をためて、ずっと欲しかったゲームを買った。
qs.en: I saved up my allowance and bought the game I'd long wanted.
qs.e: 小遣い = pocket money/spending allowance (often お小遣い). 給料(きゅうりょう) = salary/wages (pay for work). 貯金(ちょきん) = savings. 借金 = a debt/loan owed.

qs.s: 「小遣い」の意味は？
qs.e: 小遣い is money for personal spending (お小遣い = an allowance, 小遣い稼ぎ = earning a bit of pocket money).

m: the real thing; the actual object; (in) the flesh

ex.jp: 写真より実物のほうがきれいだ。
ex.en: The real thing is prettier than the photo.

qs.s: 通販で買う前に、店で＿＿＿＿を確認したい。
qs.en: Before buying online, I want to check the actual item in the store.
qs.e: 実物 = the real/actual thing (as opposed to a copy or image). 模型(もけい) = a model/replica. 写真 = a photograph. 見本(みほん) = a sample/specimen (shown as an example).

qs.s: 「実物」の意味は？
o: the real thing; the actual object; in the flesh
qs.e: 実物 is the genuine article itself (実物大 = life-size, 実物を見る = see the real thing). Contrast a model, photo, or sample.

ex.jp: その学問は理論の体系がしっかりしている。
ex.en: That discipline has a well-organized system of theory.

qs.s: 複雑な税制を、分かりやすい＿＿＿＿に整理する必要がある。
qs.en: We need to organize the complex tax rules into an understandable system.
qs.e: 体系 = an organized system/structure of ideas or elements (a coherent whole). 体制 = an organizational/political system (how a group is set up to operate). 体格 = physique/build. 団体 = a group/organization.

qs.s: 「体系」の意味は？
o: a system; organized structure of knowledge/theory
qs.e: 体系 is a coherent organized system of related parts (体系的 = systematic, 賃金体系 = a wage structure, 文法体系 = a grammar system). 体制 is more about organizational/power structure.

ex.jp: 店の入り口に防犯カメラを設置した。
ex.en: We installed a security camera at the shop entrance.

qs.s: 地域住民が協力して、＿＿＿＿パトロールを行っている。
qs.en: Local residents cooperate to carry out crime-prevention patrols.
qs.e: 防犯 = preventing crime (security against criminals). 防災(ぼうさい) = disaster prevention/preparedness. 防止 = prevention (stopping something bad, general). 予防(よぼう) = prevention (esp. of illness, in advance).

qs.s: 「防犯」の意味は？
qs.e: 防犯 specifically means guarding against crime (防犯ブザー = a personal alarm, 防犯対策 = anti-crime measures). 防災 is for natural disasters.

ex.jp: 夫婦で協力して育児をしている。
ex.en: The couple cooperates in raising their child.

qs.s: 父親も＿＿＿＿に積極的に参加する家庭が増えてきた。
qs.en: More households now have fathers actively taking part in childcare.
qs.e: 育児 = raising/caring for one's own children (at home). 教育 = education (teaching/schooling). 保育(ほいく) = (professional) day-care/nursing of children. 出産(しゅっさん) = childbirth/giving birth.

qs.s: 「育児」の意味は？
qs.e: 育児 is rearing children (育児休暇 = childcare leave, 育児書 = a parenting book). 保育 is professional childcare; 教育 is education.

ex.jp: 市民会館でコンサートが開かれる。
ex.en: A concert will be held at the citizens' hall.

qs.s: 地域の催しは、たいてい近くの市民＿＿＿＿で行われる。
qs.en: Community events are usually held at the nearby citizens' hall.
qs.e: 会館 = a hall/building for meetings and events (a facility). 会議 = a meeting (the gathering). 会場 = a venue (the place for a specific event). 会費 = a membership fee/dues.

qs.s: 「会館」の意味は？
o: a hall; assembly hall; meeting building
a venue for a specific event
qs.e: 会館 is a building used for gatherings and events (市民会館 = civic hall, 同窓会館 = an alumni hall).

ex.jp: 水平線から太陽が昇ってきた。
ex.en: The sun rose from the horizon.

qs.s: 船が遠ざかり、やがて＿＿＿＿の彼方に消えた。
qs.en: The ship receded and eventually vanished beyond the horizon.
qs.e: 水平線 = the horizon over the sea (sea-and-sky line). 地平線(ちへいせん) = the horizon over land. 稜線(りょうせん) = a mountain ridgeline. 境界線(きょうかいせん) = a boundary line.

qs.s: 「水平線」の意味は？
o: the horizon over the sea (sea-sky line)
qs.e: 水平線 is the sea horizon; over land it's 地平線. Both mean where earth/sea meets sky.

ex.jp: ボランティアで公園の清掃をした。
ex.en: We cleaned the park as volunteers.

qs.s: 駅の構内は、専門の業者によって毎晩＿＿＿＿される。
qs.en: The station premises are cleaned every night by a professional contractor.
qs.e: 清掃 = cleaning/sanitation (formal, often of public or large spaces). 洗濯 = doing laundry. 整理 = tidying/organizing/sorting. 片付け = clearing away/tidying up.

qs.s: 「清掃」の意味は？
qs.e: 清掃 is formal cleaning, often of public areas (清掃車 = a garbage/cleaning truck, 清掃員 = a cleaner/janitor). 掃除 is the everyday word for cleaning.

ex.jp: 転んで手首を痛めた。
ex.en: I fell and hurt my wrist.

qs.s: テニスのしすぎで、＿＿＿＿に負担がかかった。
qs.en: From playing too much tennis, my wrist got strained.
qs.e: 手首(てくび) = the wrist. 足首(あしくび) = the ankle. 肘(ひじ) = the elbow. 肩(かた) = the shoulder.

qs.s: 「手首」の意味は？
qs.e: 手首 is the wrist (手首を回す = rotate one's wrist). The parallel 足首 = ankle.

ex.jp: 判事が判決を言い渡した。
ex.en: The judge handed down the verdict.

qs.s: 裁判で、＿＿＿＿は双方の主張を慎重に検討した。
qs.en: In the trial, the judge carefully examined both sides' arguments.
qs.e: 判事(はんじ) = a judge (presides and rules; ≒ 裁判官). 弁護士(べんごし) = a lawyer/attorney (defends a client). 検事(けんじ) = a (public) prosecutor. 被告(ひこく) = the defendant.

qs.s: 「判事」の意味は？
o: a judge; justice (presides over a court)
qs.e: 判事 is a judge who decides cases (≒ 裁判官). Distinct from 検事 (prosecutor) and 弁護士 (lawyer).

ex.jp: その火山は百年前に噴火した。
ex.en: That volcano erupted a hundred years ago.

qs.s: 火山が＿＿＿＿し、大量の溶岩が流れ出した。
qs.en: The volcano erupted, and a large amount of lava flowed out.
qs.e: 噴火 = a volcanic eruption (a volcano spewing lava/ash). 噴水(ふんすい) = a fountain (spouting water). 爆発(ばくはつ) = an explosion. 地震 = an earthquake.

qs.s: 「噴火」の意味は？
qs.e: 噴火 is a volcano erupting (噴火口 = a crater, 大噴火 = a major eruption). The volcano is 火山.

ex.jp: 牧場で牛が草を食べている。
ex.en: Cows are grazing on the ranch.

qs.s: 広々とした＿＿＿＿で、馬がのんびりと過ごしていた。
qs.en: On the wide-open ranch, the horses were relaxing.
qs.e: 牧場 = a ranch/pasture for raising livestock (cattle, horses, sheep). 農場(のうじょう) = a farm (general, crops or animals). 果樹園(かじゅえん) = an orchard (fruit trees). 菜園(さいえん) = a vegetable garden.

qs.s: 「牧場」の意味は？
qs.e: 牧場 is land for grazing livestock (牧場主 = a rancher, also read まきば in casual/poetic use).

m: English text; a sentence/writing in English

ex.jp: この英文を日本語に訳してください。
ex.en: Please translate this English text into Japanese.

qs.s: 海外の取引先に送る＿＿＿＿のメールを、上司に確認してもらった。
qs.en: I had my boss check the English email I was sending to an overseas client.
qs.e: 英文 = text written in English. 和文(わぶん) = text written in Japanese. 作文(さくぶん) = a composition/essay one writes. 本文(ほんぶん) = the main body text.

qs.s: 「英文」の意味は？
qs.e: 英文 means English-language writing (英文法 = English grammar, 英文を読む = read English text). Its counterpart is 和文 (Japanese text).

ex.jp: その話は間接的に聞いた。
ex.en: I heard that story indirectly (secondhand).

qs.s: 喫煙は、本人だけでなく＿＿＿＿喫煙で周囲にも害を与える。
qs.en: Smoking harms not only the smoker but also those around them through secondhand smoke.
qs.e: 間接 = indirect (through an intermediary, not direct). 直接(ちょくせつ) = direct (the opposite). 間隔 = an interval/spacing. 間違い = a mistake/error.

qs.s: 「間接」の意味は？
qs.e: 間接 means not direct — via something in between (間接的 = indirect, 間接照明 = indirect lighting, 間接喫煙 = secondhand smoke). Opposite of 直接.

ex.jp: 実験には専用の器具が必要だ。
ex.en: The experiment requires special apparatus.

qs.s: 運動用の＿＿＿＿を使って、自宅で筋トレをしている。
qs.en: I do strength training at home using exercise equipment.
qs.e: 器具 = an apparatus/instrument/appliance (often specialized, for a function). 家具(かぐ) = furniture. 道具(どうぐ) = a tool/implement (general). 工具(こうぐ) = (work)tools (for building/repair, e.g. wrenches).

qs.s: 「器具」の意味は？
qs.e: 器具 refers to functional instruments and appliances (調理器具 = cooking utensils, 医療器具 = medical instruments, 照明器具 = lighting fixtures).

ex.jp: 公園に大きな彫刻が置かれている。
ex.en: A large sculpture is placed in the park.

qs.s: その芸術家は、大理石から見事な＿＿＿＿を作り出した。
qs.en: That artist produced a magnificent sculpture out of marble.
qs.e: 彫刻 = sculpture/carving (3D, shaped by carving). 絵画(かいが) = paintings/pictures. 陶器(とうき) = pottery/ceramics. 版画(はんが) = a (woodblock) print.

qs.s: 「彫刻」の意味は？
qs.e: 彫刻 is the art of carving/sculpting (彫刻家 = a sculptor, 木彫刻 = wood carving). The verb is 彫る (to carve).

m: nausea; an urge to vomit; queasiness

ex.jp: 乗り物酔いで吐き気がした。
ex.en: I felt nauseous from motion sickness.

qs.s: ひどい臭いに、思わず＿＿＿＿を催した。
qs.en: The terrible smell made me feel nauseous in spite of myself.
qs.e: 吐き気 = nausea/an urge to vomit. 眠気(ねむけ) = drowsiness/sleepiness. 寒気(さむけ) = a chill/the shivers. 食欲(しょくよく) = appetite.

qs.s: 「吐き気」の意味は？
o: nausea; an urge to vomit; queasiness
qs.e: 吐き気 is the feeling of wanting to throw up (吐き気がする = feel nauseous, 吐き気を催す = be overcome with nausea).

m: to lean on/against; (of food) to sit heavy on the stomach

ex.jp: 壁にもたれて立っていた。
ex.en: I was standing leaning against the wall.

qs.s: 疲れて、彼は椅子の背に深く＿＿＿＿。
qs.en: Tired, he leaned back deeply into the chair.
qs.e: もたれる = to lean on/against (rest one's weight); also (food) to lie heavy. ぶつかる = to collide/bump into. つまずく = to trip/stumble. しがみつく = to cling/hold on tightly.

qs.s: 「もたれる」の意味は？
o: to lean on/against; (of food) to sit heavy on the stomach
to cling; to hold on tightly
qs.e: もたれる means to rest one's weight against something (壁にもたれる = lean on the wall) and, of food, to feel heavy (胃がもたれる = have an upset/heavy stomach).

m: a complaint; a grievance; a grumble

ex.jp: 騒音について苦情が寄せられた。
ex.en: Complaints were submitted about the noise.

qs.s: サービスの悪さに、客から＿＿＿＿が殺到した。
qs.en: Complaints flooded in from customers about the poor service.
qs.e: 苦情 = a complaint/grievance (expressing dissatisfaction). 感謝 = gratitude. 要望(ようぼう) = a request/demand (asking for something). 賛成 = agreement/approval.

qs.s: 「苦情」の意味は？
qs.e: 苦情 is a complaint about dissatisfaction (苦情を言う = make a complaint, 苦情処理 = complaint handling). ≒ クレーム.

ex.jp: 京都には古い寺院が多い。
ex.en: There are many old temples in Kyoto.

qs.s: その＿＿＿＿は、千年以上の歴史を持つ。
qs.en: That temple has a history of over a thousand years.
qs.e: 寺院(じいん) = a (Buddhist) temple (formal term; ≒ お寺). 神社(じんじゃ) = a Shinto shrine. 教会(きょうかい) = a (Christian) church. 城(しろ) = a castle.

qs.s: 「寺院」の意味は？
qs.e: 寺院 is the formal word for a Buddhist temple (仏教寺院 = a Buddhist temple). Don't confuse with 神社 (Shinto shrine).

ex.jp: 激しい運動で体力を消耗した。
ex.en: I used up my stamina with intense exercise.

qs.s: 長時間の交渉で、精神的に大きく＿＿＿＿した。
qs.en: The long negotiation left me greatly drained mentally.
qs.e: 消耗 = using up/being worn down (energy, supplies, stamina). 回復 = recovery/restoration. 補充(ほじゅう) = replenishing/refilling. 蓄積(ちくせき) = accumulation/building up.

qs.s: 「消耗」の意味は？
qs.e: 消耗 means using up or being drained (消耗品 = consumables/expendables, 体力を消耗 = deplete one's stamina). Also commonly read しょうこう in some contexts.

m: one after another; in rapid succession; successively

ex.jp: 新商品が続々と発売される。
ex.en: New products are released one after another.

qs.s: 開店と同時に、客が＿＿＿＿と店内に入ってきた。
qs.en: The moment it opened, customers came into the shop one after another.
qs.e: 続々(と) = one after another/in rapid succession (many things coming in a stream). めったに = (with neg.) rarely. たまに = occasionally. 次第に = gradually.

qs.s: 「続々」の意味は？
o: one after another; in rapid succession
qs.e: 続々 describes things arriving or happening in a continuous stream (続々と集まる = gather in droves, 続々入荷 = arriving in stock one after another).

ex.jp: 空が灰色の雲に覆われている。
ex.en: The sky is covered with gray clouds.

qs.s: 彼はいつも＿＿＿＿のスーツを着ている。
qs.en: He always wears a gray suit.
qs.e: 灰色(はいいろ) = gray/ashen. 金色(きんいろ) = gold(en). 水色(みずいろ) = light blue. 茶色(ちゃいろ) = brown.

qs.s: 「灰色」の意味は？
qs.e: 灰色 is gray, the color of ash (灰 = ash). Figuratively, 灰色の人生 = a bleak/dreary life. ≒ グレー.

ex.jp: 海洋には未知の生物が多い。
ex.en: There are many unknown creatures in the ocean.

qs.s: プラスチックごみによる＿＿＿＿汚染が深刻化している。
qs.en: Ocean pollution from plastic waste is worsening.
qs.e: 海洋 = the ocean/seas (large-scale, often scientific/policy contexts). 海岸 = the coast/shore. 湖(みずうみ) = a lake. 河川(かせん) = rivers (formal term).

qs.s: 「海洋」の意味は？
qs.e: 海洋 refers to the oceans at large (海洋資源 = marine resources, 海洋汚染 = ocean pollution). More scientific/grand than 海 (the everyday 'sea').

ex.jp: みんなで乾杯しよう。
ex.en: Let's make a toast, everyone.

qs.s: 新郎新婦の幸せを願って、グラスを上げて＿＿＿＿した。
qs.en: Wishing the newlyweds happiness, we raised our glasses and toasted.
qs.e: 乾杯(かんぱい) = a toast/'Cheers!' (raising glasses). 拍手(はくしゅ) = applause/clapping. 握手(あくしゅ) = a handshake. 挨拶(あいさつ) = a greeting.

qs.s: 「乾杯」の意味は？
qs.e: 乾杯 is a toast (乾杯の音頭 = leading a toast). Literally '(drink the cup) dry.'

m: the middle third of a month (roughly the 11th–20th)

ex.jp: 桜は四月の中旬に満開になる。
ex.en: The cherry blossoms reach full bloom in mid-April.

qs.s: プロジェクトの締め切りは、来月の＿＿＿＿あたりだ。
qs.en: The project deadline is around the middle of next month.
qs.e: 中旬(ちゅうじゅん) = the middle third of a month (~11th–20th). 上旬 = the first third (1st–10th). 下旬 = the last third (21st–end). 中間 = the middle (general, between two things).

qs.s: 「中旬」の意味は？
o: the middle third of a month (~11th–20th)
qs.e: 中旬 is the mid-month period. The set: 上旬 (early), 中旬 (mid), 下旬 (late).

ex.jp: 住所の番地を正確に書く。
ex.en: I write the address's lot number accurately.

qs.s: 地図を見ても、その＿＿＿＿の家がどこか分からなかった。
qs.en: Even looking at the map, I couldn't tell where the house with that lot number was.
qs.e: 番地 = the lot/house number within an address. 番号(ばんごう) = a number (general identifier, e.g. phone). 住所 = the full address. 地域 = a region/area.

qs.s: 「番地」の意味は？
qs.e: 番地 is the lot number part of a Japanese address (一丁目三番地 = block 1, lot 3). The whole address is 住所.

m: science and learning; scholarship; academic study

ex.jp: その雑誌は学術的な記事を載せている。
ex.en: That journal carries academic articles.

qs.s: 研究成果は、権威ある＿＿＿＿雑誌に掲載された。
qs.en: The research findings were published in a prestigious academic journal.
qs.e: 学術 = scholarship/academic study (scholarly research). 芸術(げいじゅつ) = (fine) art. 技術 = technology/technique. 美術(びじゅつ) = visual/fine arts.

qs.s: 「学術」の意味は？
o: scholarship; academic study; science and learning
qs.e: 学術 pertains to academic scholarship (学術論文 = a scholarly paper, 学術用語 = academic terminology, 学術会議 = an academic conference).

ex.jp: 輸入品に課税される。
ex.en: A tax is levied on imported goods.

qs.s: 一定の収入を超えると、＿＿＿＿の対象になる。
qs.en: Once you exceed a certain income, you become subject to taxation.
qs.e: 課税 = imposing/levying a tax (on someone). 減税(げんぜい) = a tax cut/reduction. 免税(めんぜい) = tax exemption/duty-free. 納税(のうぜい) = paying tax (by the taxpayer).

qs.s: 「課税」の意味は？
qs.e: 課税 is the act of imposing tax (課税対象 = taxable, 課税所得 = taxable income). 納税 is the citizen's side (paying); 免税 is exemption.

m: a symbol; sign; mark (a meaningful notation)

ex.jp: 地図の記号の意味を覚える。
ex.en: I memorize the meanings of the map symbols.

qs.s: 重要な箇所には、星の＿＿＿＿を付けておいた。
qs.en: I put a star symbol next to the important parts.
qs.e: 記号 = a symbol/sign/mark (a notation with meaning, e.g. ＋, ♪). 番号 = a number (an identifier). 暗号(あんごう) = a code/cipher (secret). 符号(ふごう) = a sign/symbol/code (close to 記号; often in math/data as a 'sign').

qs.s: 「記号」の意味は？
qs.e: 記号 is a symbol or mark standing for something (発音記号 = phonetic symbols, 記号で表す = represent with symbols).

m: a producing region; place of origin (of goods)

ex.jp: この野菜の産地は北海道だ。
ex.en: The production region of this vegetable is Hokkaido.

qs.s: 食品を買うときは、＿＿＿＿の表示を確認している。
qs.en: When buying food, I check the labeling of the place of origin.
qs.e: 産地 = the region where a product is grown/made (its origin). 現地 = the actual site/local area (where something happens). 各地 = various places/regions. 土地 = land/a plot of ground.

qs.s: 「産地」の意味は？
o: a producing region; place of origin of goods
qs.e: 産地 is where a product originates (産地直送 = shipped directly from the source, 名産地 = a region famous for a product).

ex.jp: 詳しい説明は省略します。
ex.en: I'll omit the detailed explanation.

qs.s: 長い正式名称は、頭文字をとって＿＿＿＿される。
qs.en: The long official name is abbreviated using its initials.
qs.e: 省略 = omitting/abbreviating (leaving out for brevity, while implied). 削除 = deletion (removing entirely). 追加 = addition (adding on). 強調 = emphasis/stressing.

qs.s: 「省略」の意味は？
o: omission; abbreviation; leaving out for brevity
qs.e: 省略 means leaving something out, often understood from context (以下省略 = the rest is omitted, 省略形 = an abbreviated form). 削除 is outright deletion.

ex.jp: 線路の近くに住んでいる。
ex.en: I live near the railway tracks.

qs.s: 動物が＿＿＿＿に立ち入り、電車が緊急停止した。
qs.en: An animal entered the tracks, and the train made an emergency stop.
qs.e: 線路 = railway tracks/the rail line. 道路 = a road/street (for vehicles). 通路 = a passage/aisle (for people). 回路 = an (electric) circuit.

qs.s: 「線路」の意味は？
qs.e: 線路 is the railway track (線路沿い = along the tracks, 線路を渡る = cross the tracks).

m: to hit; to strike; to punch; to beat

ex.jp: 暴力で人を殴ってはいけない。
ex.en: You must not hit people with violence.

qs.s: カッとなって相手を＿＿＿＿しまい、後で深く反省した。
qs.en: He flew into a rage and ended up punching the other person, and deeply regretted it later.
qs.e: 殴る = to hit/punch/strike (with a fist). 褒める(ほめる) = to praise. 慰める(なぐさめる) = to comfort/console. 支える(ささえる) = to support/hold up.

qs.s: 「殴る」の意味は？
o: to hit; to strike; to punch; to beat
qs.e: 殴る means to strike with a fist (殴り合い = a fistfight, 顔を殴る = punch in the face).

ex.jp: 包丁で野菜を切る。
ex.en: I cut vegetables with a kitchen knife.

qs.s: よく切れるように、＿＿＿＿を砥石で研いだ。
qs.en: I sharpened the kitchen knife on a whetstone so it would cut well.
qs.e: 包丁(ほうちょう) = a kitchen knife. はさみ = scissors. まな板(まないた) = a cutting board. フォーク = a fork.

qs.s: 「包丁」の意味は？
qs.e: 包丁 is a kitchen knife (包丁を研ぐ = sharpen a knife, 出刃包丁 = a fish-cleaving knife).

m: a government office; public office (city hall, etc.)

ex.jp: 転入の手続きは役所で行う。
ex.en: You do the move-in procedures at the government office.

qs.s: 住民票を取りに、市の＿＿＿＿へ行った。
qs.en: I went to the city office to get a residence certificate.
qs.e: 役所(やくしょ) = a government/public office (where administrative business is done). 役者(やくしゃ) = an actor. 役目(やくめ) = a role/duty. 役割(やくわり) = a role/part one plays.

qs.s: 「役所」の意味は？
o: a government office; public office (city hall)
qs.e: 役所 is a government office handling public administration (市役所 = city hall, 区役所 = ward office, 役所仕事 = bureaucratic/red-tape work).

ex.jp: 書類を郵送で送ってください。
ex.en: Please send the documents by mail.

qs.s: 申込書は、窓口提出のほか＿＿＿＿でも受け付けています。
qs.en: Application forms are accepted by mail as well as in-person submission.
qs.e: 郵送 = sending via the postal service (by mail). 配達(はいたつ) = delivery (bringing to the recipient). 運送(うんそう) = transport/freight carriage. 発送(はっそう) = dispatching/shipping out (sending off, by any means).

qs.s: 「郵送」の意味は？
qs.e: 郵送 specifically means sending through the post (郵送料 = postage, 郵送で届く = arrive by mail).

ex.jp: 牛乳を加熱して温める。
ex.en: I heat the milk to warm it.

qs.s: この食品は、電子レンジで十分に＿＿＿＿してから食べる。
qs.en: This food is eaten after thoroughly heating it in the microwave.
qs.e: 加熱 = heating/applying heat. 冷却(れいきゃく) = cooling. 加圧(かあつ) = applying pressure. 保温(ほおん) = keeping warm/retaining heat.

qs.s: 「加熱」の意味は？
qs.e: 加熱 means heating something up (加熱処理 = heat treatment, 加熱調理 = cooking with heat). Figuratively 加熱する = to heat up/overheat (e.g. competition). Opposite: 冷却.

m: a concept; notion; idea; (also) resigning oneself

ex.jp: 時間に対する観念は人によって違う。
ex.en: People's notion of time differs from person to person.

qs.s: 彼には罪の＿＿＿＿が薄く、悪びれる様子がなかった。
qs.en: He had little sense of guilt and showed no signs of remorse.
qs.e: 観念 = a concept/notion/idea (an abstract mental conception). 観察 = observation (watching closely). 観客 = the audience/spectators. 観光 = sightseeing/tourism.

qs.s: 「観念」の意味は？
qs.e: 観念 is an abstract idea or sense (固定観念 = a fixed idea/stereotype, 時間の観念 = sense of time). As a verb, 観念する = to resign oneself/give up.

m: a limit; bounds; the maximum extent

ex.jp: 我慢にも限度がある。
ex.en: There's a limit even to one's patience.

qs.s: カードの利用には、月ごとの＿＿＿＿が設定されている。
qs.en: A monthly limit is set on use of the card.
qs.e: 限度 = a set limit/bounds (the maximum allowed). 程度 = a degree/extent (how much). 限界(げんかい) = the absolute limit/breaking point (one's capacity). 制限(せいげん) = a restriction/limitation (imposed). 限度 and 限界 overlap; 限度 is a defined ceiling, 限界 the ultimate breaking point.

qs.s: 「限度」の意味は？
o: a limit; bounds; the maximum extent
qs.e: 限度 is the set boundary or maximum (限度額 = a maximum amount, 限度を超える = exceed the limit). 限界 is the ultimate breaking point.

ex.jp: 映画は手軽な娯楽の一つだ。
ex.en: Movies are one form of easy entertainment.

qs.s: テレビが、当時の人々にとって最大の＿＿＿＿だった。
qs.en: Television was the greatest form of entertainment for people back then.
qs.e: 娯楽 = entertainment/amusement/recreation (for enjoyment). 労働 = labor/work. 学習 = learning/study. 運動 = exercise; a movement.

qs.s: 「娯楽」の意味は？
qs.e: 娯楽 is leisure entertainment (娯楽施設 = entertainment facilities, 娯楽番組 = an entertainment program).

ex.jp: 新しい住居を探している。
ex.en: I'm looking for a new place to live.

qs.s: この建物は、店舗と＿＿＿＿が一体となった構造だ。
qs.en: This building has a structure combining a shop and a residence.
qs.e: 住居(じゅうきょ) = a dwelling/residence (the building/place one lives). 住所 = an address (the written location). 近所 = the neighborhood (nearby area). 別荘(べっそう) = a villa/vacation home.

qs.s: 「住居」の意味は？
o: a dwelling; residence; one's home (the place)
qs.e: 住居 is a place of residence (住居費 = housing costs, 住居侵入 = trespassing into a dwelling). Distinct from 住所 (the address).

ex.jp: エアコンの温度を調節する。
ex.en: I adjust the air conditioner's temperature.

qs.s: カーテンで、部屋に入る光の量を＿＿＿＿する。
qs.en: I regulate the amount of light entering the room with the curtains.
qs.e: 調節 = adjusting/regulating to a desired level (fine-tuning, e.g. temperature, volume). 調査 = investigation/survey. 調子(ちょうし) = condition/tune/pace (how something is going). 強調 = emphasis/stressing.

qs.s: 「調節」の意味は？
qs.e: 調節 means adjusting something to the right level (温度調節 = temperature control, 音量を調節 = adjust the volume). ≒ 調整, but 調節 leans toward fine-tuning levels.

m: full (of people); no vacancy; packed; sold out

ex.jp: 朝の電車はいつも満員だ。
ex.en: The morning train is always packed.

qs.s: コンサートは＿＿＿＿で、当日券は手に入らなかった。
qs.en: The concert was sold out, and same-day tickets weren't available.
qs.e: 満員 = full of people/no vacancy (packed to capacity). 空席(くうせき) = an empty/vacant seat. 定員(ていいん) = the capacity/fixed number of people allowed. 満点 = a perfect score.

qs.s: 「満員」の意味は？
o: full of people; no vacancy; packed; sold out
qs.e: 満員 means filled to capacity with people (満員電車 = a packed train, 満員御礼 = 'thank you, full house').

ex.jp: 薬局で風邪薬を買った。
ex.en: I bought cold medicine at the pharmacy.

qs.s: 処方箋を持って、病院前の＿＿＿＿で薬を受け取った。
qs.en: With my prescription, I picked up the medicine at the pharmacy in front of the hospital.
qs.e: 薬局(やっきょく) = a pharmacy/drugstore (dispenses medicine). 病院 = a hospital. 診療所(しんりょうじょ) = a clinic (small medical practice). 保健所(ほけんじょ) = a public health center.

qs.s: 「薬局」の意味は？
qs.e: 薬局 dispenses and sells medicine (調剤薬局 = a dispensing pharmacy, 薬剤師 = a pharmacist).

ex.jp: 両国は友好関係を深めている。
ex.en: The two countries are deepening their friendly relations.

qs.s: 姉妹都市として、長年にわたり＿＿＿＿を築いてきた。
qs.en: As sister cities, they have built friendly ties over many years.
qs.e: 友好 = friendship/amity (esp. between groups or nations). 敵対(てきたい) = hostility/antagonism (the opposite). 対立 = confrontation/opposition. 競争 = competition/rivalry.

qs.s: 「友好」の意味は？
qs.e: 友好 means friendly relations on a group/national level (友好的 = friendly/amicable, 友好条約 = a treaty of friendship). For personal friendship, 友情 is used.

ex.jp: この物語は架空の世界が舞台だ。
ex.en: This story is set in a fictional world.

qs.s: 登場人物はすべて＿＿＿＿で、実在の人物ではない。
qs.en: All the characters are fictional and not real people.
qs.e: 架空 = fictional/imaginary/made-up (not real). 実在(じつざい) = actually existing/real. 現実 = reality/the actual. 事実 = a fact/the truth.

qs.s: 「架空」の意味は？
qs.e: 架空 means made-up/not real (架空の人物 = a fictional character, 架空請求 = a bogus/phantom billing scam). Opposite of 実在.

ex.jp: 彼の功績は高く評価されている。
ex.en: His achievements are highly regarded.

qs.s: その科学者は、医学の発展に大きな＿＿＿＿を残した。
qs.en: That scientist left great contributions to the advancement of medicine.
qs.e: 功績 = a meritorious achievement/contribution (praiseworthy deeds). 失敗 = a failure. 損害(そんがい) = damage/loss. 責任 = responsibility.

qs.s: 「功績」の意味は？
qs.e: 功績 refers to praiseworthy accomplishments (功績をたたえる = honor someone's achievements, 多大な功績 = great contributions).

m: refined; elegant; classy; in good taste

ex.jp: 彼女は上品な話し方をする。
ex.en: She speaks in a refined manner.

qs.s: その店は、落ち着いた＿＿＿＿な雰囲気で人気がある。
qs.en: That shop is popular for its calm, refined atmosphere.
qs.e: 上品(じょうひん) = refined/elegant/in good taste. 下品(げひん) = vulgar/coarse/in poor taste (the opposite). 派手 = flashy/showy. 地味 = plain/subdued.

qs.s: 「上品」の意味は？
o: refined; elegant; classy; in good taste
qs.e: 上品 describes elegance and good taste (上品な味 = a delicate, refined flavor). Opposite of 下品 (vulgar).

ex.jp: この線に電流が流れている。
ex.en: An electric current is flowing through this wire.

qs.s: スイッチを入れると、回路に＿＿＿＿が流れる。
qs.en: When you flip the switch, current flows through the circuit.
qs.e: 電流 = electric current (the flow of charge). 電圧(でんあつ) = voltage (electric pressure). 電波 = radio waves/signal. 電池 = a battery.

qs.s: 「電流」の意味は？
qs.e: 電流 is the flow of electricity (電流が流れる = current flows, 電流計 = an ammeter). 電圧 is voltage.

m: internal medicine; the internal medicine department

ex.jp: 熱が出たので内科を受診した。
ex.en: I had a fever, so I saw the internal medicine department.

qs.s: 手術ではなく薬で治す病気なら、＿＿＿＿が専門だ。
qs.en: For illnesses treated with medicine rather than surgery, internal medicine is the specialty.
qs.e: 内科(ないか) = internal medicine (treats with medication, not surgery). 外科(げか) = surgery (operates). 産婦人科(さんふじんか) = obstetrics and gynecology. 歯科(しか) = dentistry.

qs.s: 「内科」の意味は？
qs.e: 内科 treats illnesses non-surgically with medicine (内科医 = a physician/internist). Contrast 外科 (surgery).

ex.jp: 嘘をついて逃げるなんて卑怯だ。
ex.en: Lying and running away is cowardly.

qs.s: 弱い者をいじめるなんて、＿＿＿＿なやり方だ。
qs.en: Bullying the weak is a cowardly, dirty way to behave.
qs.e: 卑怯(ひきょう) = cowardly/unfair/underhanded. 勇敢(ゆうかん) = brave/courageous (the opposite). 正直 = honest/truthful. 公平 = fair/impartial.

qs.s: 「卑怯」の意味は？
qs.e: 卑怯 condemns cowardly or dishonorable conduct (卑怯者 = a coward, 卑怯な手 = a dirty trick). Opposite of 勇敢/正々堂々.
